name: Kachin State (Myanmar)
description: Flag of Kachin State, with the Kachin state emblem — a Manau totem, a sun, and crossed swords — at the centre.
history: Used by the Kachin State government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.

features.symbolism: the flag of Kachin State, with the Kachin state emblem — a Manau totem, a sun, and crossed swords — at the centre
